findings.name: Use of a broken or weak cryptographic hashing algorithm on sensitive data
findings.description:
[Sensitive data (password)](1) is used in a hashing algorithm (SHA256) that is insecure for password hashing, since it is not a computationally expensive hash function.

[Sensitive data (password)](3) is used in a hashing algorithm (SHA256) that is insecure for password hashing, since it is not a computationally expensive hash function.
